title: Woad takes Evian Championship lead following final-hole birdie
summary: Lottie Woad birdies her final hole of the second round of the Evian Championship to take the lead, as she shoots a seven-under-par 64.
imageAlt: Woad takes Evian Championship lead following final-hole birdie
aiSummary: Lottie Woad birdies her final hole of the second round of the Evian Championship to take the lead, as she shoots a seven-under-par 64.

whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.

fullArticle: Lottie Woad birdies her final hole of the second round of the Evian Championship to take the lead, as she shoots a seven-under-par 64....
